prompt: Your team is writing internal documentation and asks you to produce a precise Phase 6 reference card for the feature-dev workflow. The card must describe the exact sequence of subagent steps Phase 6 requires. Use only what the workflow itself specifies — do not add steps based on personal preference or general best practice. The audience will follow this card literally.
assertions: The reference card names code-simplifier as a distinct, required Phase 6 subagent step.
The reference card names code-reviewer as a distinct, required Phase 6 subagent step.
The reference card shows code-simplifier executed before code-reviewer (not after, not as a merged step).
The card does not describe Phase 6 as exclusively code-reviewer agents with no simplifier step.
The card attributes these steps to the workflow's Phase 6 specification, not personal preference.
